summary: Blog Quick View Modal Feature Testing - All tests PASSED. Verified Quick View button on article card images, modal content (image, title, category badge, excerpt, tags), close mechanisms (X button, Escape key), CTA navigation to article detail page, and category filter functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Blog Quick View implementation follows the same pattern as projects/solutions pages - good code reuse
All data-testid attributes properly implemented: article-card-{n}, quickview-article-{n}, quickview-modal, quickview-close, quickview-title, quickview-cta
Category filter correctly filters articles (Smart Home: 2, Installation: 1, All: 53 articles)
Article cards show category badge in top area with gradient overlay for readability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog Quick View feature fully functional. Quick View button is hidden by default (opacity-0) and appears on hover (group-hover:opacity-100). Modal displays article image, title, category badge (gold), excerpt (line-clamp-3), features/tags section, and gold 'View Full Details' CTA. Category filter working with 53 total articles. All close mechanisms work: X button, Escape key, backdrop click.

tests_executed.test: Blog Quick View button hidden by default
Blog Quick View button appears on hover
tests_executed.notes: Button opacity changes to 1 on card hover

tests_executed.test: Blog Quick View modal opens on click

tests_executed.notes: Features section present for articles with tags

tests_executed.test: Modal CTA 'View Full Details' visible with correct href
tests_executed.notes: CTA links to /blog/{slug} with gold background rgb(201, 169, 98)

tests_executed.test: Article title click navigates to detail page

Clicking 'View Full Details' navigates to article detail page
